bash_commands.command: cat /etc/hosts | grep -i agent || echo "No agent-related entries"

pip show openhands-aci 2>&1 || pip download openhands-aci==0.2.15 --no-deps -d /tmp && unzip -p /tmp/openhands_aci-0.2.15*.whl '*.dist-info/METADATA' 2>/dev/null | grep -i tree-sitter || echo "No tree-sitter dependency found"
pip download openhands-aci==0.1.0 --no-deps -d /tmp 2>&1 && unzip -p /tmp/openhands_aci-0.1.0*.whl '*.dist-info/METADATA' 2>/dev/null | grep -i tree-sitter || echo "No tree-sitter dependency found"

for v in 0.1.1 0.1.2 0.1.3 0.1.4 0.1.5 0.1.6 0.1.7 0.1.8 0.1.9 0.2.0; do
  pip download openhands-aci==$v --no-deps -d /tmp 2>/dev/null
  echo "=== Version $v ==="
  unzip -p /tmp/openhands_aci-$v*.whl '*.dist-info/METADATA' 2>/dev/null | grep -i "tree-sitter"
done

for v in 0.2.1 0.2.2 0.2.3 0.2.4 0.2.5 0.2.6 0.2.7 0.2.8 0.2.9 0.2.10; do
  pip download openhands-aci==$v --no-deps -d /tmp 2>/dev/null
  echo "=== Version $v ==="
  unzip -p /tmp/openhands_aci-$v*.whl '*.dist-info/METADATA' 2>/dev/null | grep -i "Requires-Dist: tree-sitter"
done
poetry show tree-sitter 2>/dev/null && poetry show zope-interface 2>/dev/null
